## One-Line Fibonacci Function

```python
fib = lambda n: n if n <= 1 else fib(n - 1) + fib(n - 2)
```

### Usage
```python
print(fib(0))   # 0
print(fib(1))   # 1
print(fib(10))  # 55
print(fib(15))  # 610
```

### Alternative with `functools.cache` for Better Performance
```python
from functools import cache

fib = cache(lambda n: n if n <= 1 else fib(n - 1) + fib(n - 2))
```

> **Note:** The basic recursive version has **O(2ⁿ)** time complexity. The cached version reduces it to **O(n)** by memoizing previously computed values, making it suitable for larger values of `n`.
